name: io.github.ericlovold/sanction
description: Spend authorization, token budgets, and an encrypted credential vault for autonomous AI agents. The agent asks before it spends; you set the policy.

environmentVariables.name: SANCTION_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Agent API key (pxy_...). Create one at https://onesanction.com or via POST /api/v1/wallets then POST /api/v1/agents.

environmentVariables.name: SANCTION_WALLET_ID
environmentVariables.description: Wallet id, used by the sanction_wallet_status tool.
